Document:
# Capital Crimes These crimes are extreme severity. All of these crimes are be punished by permanent confinement and demotion.
## Jailbreak/Escape To escape, assist in an escape, attempt escape, or be willfully and knowingly broken out from a cell.
## Attempted Murder Attempting to murder a person but failing to do so. If the evidence shows that the arrested person was clearly trying to kill someone with ill intent but failed in the action itself.
## Murder Killing someone with malicious intent. This includes Synthetic units. The charge applies even if the victim is later revived.
## Sedition To engage in actions or refuse to follow orders as to overthrow or usurp the legitimate command structure. Creating a massive threat to the ship without the knowledge and approval of the command falls under sedition.
## Desertion Refusing to carry out the duties essential to one’s post or abandoning post unauthorized, without intent to return. (Retreating from the planet when the FOB is breached is not Desertion, refusing to return when ordered is).
## Crimes against humanity To engage in actions that violate human rights or otherwise are heinous acts against human life. Examples are torture, cannibalism and forced infection of any kind.
